flags_raised: F-3 BRIEF_DRIFT (Bucket A) — FA 2021 Sch 24 (MTD points-based late-submission regime) vs FA 2007 Sch 24 (long-standing inaccuracy regime) numerical-name collision flagged at A16 + A18 seeds; sessions writing the MTD penalty regime must NOT collapse the two Sch 24 instruments. Multi-page LPC cluster intentional with A2 (DDS umbrella) + A3 (benefits-tally) + A12 (orientation) + A14 (calculator) + A15 (strategic-rationale) + A17 (emotional-rescue) each targeting distinct search intent within the LPC space — A12 is the orientation hub; A14 is the calculator-led numerical estimation; A15 is strategic-philosophical; A17 is emotional-rescue / panic-moment-action; A3 is tactical-benefits-tally; A2 is product-architecture umbrella. F-1-adjacent risk recurrence on A13 + A16: legacy Sch 56 31/46/91 day-triggers crossed with new §19.7 3%/3%/10% percentages is the operational drift risk; both seeds explicitly distinguish the legacy schedule (for non-MTD landlords below threshold + VAT) from the new MTD ITSA schedule (15/30/31 day-triggers + 3%/3%/10%). Sessions writing must NOT cross-import.
